00001| import { useState, useCallback } from 'react'
00002| import { config } from '@/config'
00003| 
00004| interface MoralisToken {
00005|   token_address: string
00006|   symbol: string
00007|   name: string
00008|   logo: string | null
00009|   thumbnail: string | null
00010|   decimals: number
00011|   balance: string
00012|   possible_spam: boolean
00013|   verified_contract: boolean
00014|   balance_formatted?: string
00015|   usd_price?: number
00016|   usd_value?: number
00017|   chainId?: number
00018| }
00019| 
00020| interface MoralisPortfolioResponse {
00021|   tokens: MoralisToken[]
00022|   totalValueUsd: number
00023| }
00024| 
00025| const MORALIS_CHAIN_MAP: Record<number, string> = {
00026|   1: 'eth',
00027|   8453: 'base',
00028|   42161: 'arbitrum',
00029|   137: 'polygon',
00030|   10: 'optimism',
00031| }
00032| 
00033| /**
00034|  * Hook for fetching portfolio data from Moralis
00035|  */
00036| export function useMoralisPortfolio() {
00037|   const [data, setData] = useState<MoralisPortfolioResponse | null>(null)
00038|   const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false)
00039|   const [error, setError] = useState<Error | null>(null)
00040| 
00041|   const fetchPortfolio = useCallback(async (
00042|     walletAddress: string,
00043|     chainIds: number[]
00044|   ): Promise<MoralisPortfolioResponse> => {
00045|     setIsLoading(true)
00046|     setError(null)
00047| 
00048|     try {
00049|       const apiKey = config.moralis.apiKey
00050|       if (!apiKey) {
00051|         throw new Error('Moralis API key not configured')
00052|       }
00053| 
00054|       const allTokens: MoralisToken[] = []
00055|       let totalValueUsd = 0
00056| 
00057|       // Fetch tokens for each chain
00058|       for (const chainId of chainIds) {
00059|         const chain = MORALIS_CHAIN_MAP[chainId]
00060|         if (!chain) {
00061|           console.warn(`Chain ${chainId} not supported by Moralis`)
00062|           continue
00063|         }
00064| 
00065|         try {
00066|           const url = `https://deep-index.moralis.io/api/v2.2/${walletAddress}/erc20?chain=${chain}`
00067|           
00068|           const response = await fetch(url, {
00069|             method: 'GET',
00070|             headers: {
00071|               'accept': 'application/json',
00072|               'X-API-Key': apiKey,
00073|             },
00074|           })
00075| 
00076|           if (!response.ok) {
00077|             console.error(`Failed to fetch tokens for chain ${chain}:`, response.statusText)
00078|             continue
00079|           }
00080| 
00081|           const tokens: MoralisToken[] = await response.json()
00082|           
00083|           // Filter out spam tokens and add chain info
00084|           const validTokens = tokens
00085|             .filter(token => !token.possible_spam)
00086|             .map(token => {
00087|               const balance = parseFloat(token.balance) / Math.pow(10, token.decimals)
00088|               const balanceFormatted = balance.toFixed(6)
00089|               const usdValue = token.usd_price ? balance * token.usd_price : 0
00090|               
00091|               if (usdValue > 0) {
00092|                 totalValueUsd += usdValue
00093|               }
00094| 
00095|               return {
00096|                 ...token,
00097|                 balance_formatted: balanceFormatted,
00098|                 usd_value: usdValue,
00099|                 chainId, // Add chain ID to each token
00100|               }
00101|             })
00102| 
00103|           allTokens.push(...validTokens)
00104|         } catch (err) {
00105|           console.error(`Error fetching tokens for chain ${chain}:`, err)
00106|         }
00107|       }
00108| 
00109|       // Fetch native token balances
00110|       for (const chainId of chainIds) {
00111|         const chain = MORALIS_CHAIN_MAP[chainId]
00112|         if (!chain) continue
00113| 
00114|         try {
00115|           const url = `https://deep-index.moralis.io/api/v2.2/${walletAddress}/balance?chain=${chain}`
00116|           
00117|           const response = await fetch(url, {
00118|             method: 'GET',
00119|             headers: {
00120|               'accept': 'application/json',
00121|               'X-API-Key': apiKey,
00122|             },
00123|           })
00124| 
00125|           if (!response.ok) {
00126|             console.error(`Failed to fetch native balance for chain ${chain}:`, response.statusText)
00127|             continue
00128|           }
00129| 
00130|           const data = await response.json()
00131|           const balance = parseFloat(data.balance) / 1e18
00132|           
00133|           if (balance > 0) {
00134|             // Get native token info
00135|             const nativeTokens: Record<string, { symbol: string; name: string }> = {
00136|               'eth': { symbol: 'ETH', name: 'Ethereum' },
00137|               'base': { symbol: 'ETH', name: 'Ethereum' },
00138|               'arbitrum': { symbol: 'ETH', name: 'Ethereum' },
00139|               'polygon': { symbol: 'MATIC', name: 'Polygon' },
00140|               'optimism': { symbol: 'ETH', name: 'Ethereum' },
00141|             }
00142| 
00143|             const nativeInfo = nativeTokens[chain] || { symbol: 'ETH', name: 'Ethereum' }
00144|             
00145|             allTokens.push({
00146|               token_address: 'native',
00147|               symbol: nativeInfo.symbol,
00148|               name: nativeInfo.name,
00149|               logo: null,
00150|               thumbnail: null,
00151|               decimals: 18,
00152|               balance: data.balance,
00153|               possible_spam: false,
00154|               verified_contract: true,
00155|               balance_formatted: balance.toFixed(6),
00156|               usd_price: 0, // Would need price API
00157|               usd_value: 0,
00158|               chainId, // Add chain ID
00159|             })
00160|           }
00161|         } catch (err) {
00162|           console.error(`Error fetching native balance for chain ${chain}:`, err)
00163|         }
00164|       }
00165| 
00166|       const result = {
00167|         tokens: allTokens,
00168|         totalValueUsd,
00169|       }
00170| 
00171|       setData(result)
00172|       return result
00173|     } catch (err) {
00174|       const error = err instanceof Error ? err : new Error('Failed to fetch portfolio')
00175|       setError(error)
00176|       throw error
00177|     } finally {
00178|       setIsLoading(false)
00179|     }
00180|   }, [])
00181| 
00182|   return {
00183|     data,
00184|     isLoading,
00185|     error,
00186|     fetchPortfolio,
00187|   }
00188| }
00189| 
</file>

import { useState, useCallback } from 'react'
import { config } from '@/config'

interface MoralisToken {
  token_address: string
  symbol: string
  name: string
  logo: string | null
  thumbnail: string | null
  decimals: number
  balance: string
  possible_spam: boolean
  verified_contract: boolean
  balance_formatted?: string
  usd_price?: number
  usd_value?: number
  chainId?: number
}

interface MoralisPortfolioResponse {
